The '''Battle of Byblos''' was a battle that occurred on [[Byblos/Legends|Byblos]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. During the battle, a squad of [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|ARC troopers]] hijacked an [[SRT autonomous short-range transport|SRT droid]] to ride to get behind [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy]] lines before the battle actually occurred.

{{Battle-stub}}
